charter: Fix approved intent auto-suppression: approved intents must carry over between runs instead of being silently discarded
acceptance_contract: Approved intents survive run transitions and are picked up by the next run
Intents are only suppressed by explicit operator action or dedup logic not by run archival
Beta bug reports from tusq.dev and diapr.ai are not lost between runs
